---
title: "Research"
---

This page is under construction...

## Themes

### Real-time outbreak analytics
- Estimating key epidemiological parameters (e.g., [incubation period](https://doi.org/10.2807/1560-7917.ES.2022.27.24.2200448), [serial interval](https://academic.oup.com/jid/article/229/3/800/7103467))
- Monitoring epidemic trends
  - Nowcasting ([mpox](https://www.eurosurveillance.org/content/10.2807/1560-7917.ES.2023.28.12.2200772))
  - Effective reproduction number using wastewater data (see [Miyazawa et al.](https://www.eurosurveillance.org/content/10.2807/1560-7917.ES.2024.29.8.2300277) and [van Boven et al.](https://www.eurosurveillance.org/content/10.2807/1560-7917.ES.2023.28.25.2200700))
  - We contribute to [RespiCast forecasting hub](https://www.medrxiv.org/content/10.1101/2025.10.30.25339155v2) 

### Epidemic modelling for decision making
- Designing targeted control strategies
  - Optimal vaccine allocation using approximated next-generation matrices ([Miura et al. (2021) Plos Comp Bio](https://journals.plos.org/ploscompbiol/article?id=10.1371/journal.pcbi.1009697))
  - Temporal shift in the dominant transmission route for mpox clade Ib ([Miura and Leung et al. (2026) Sci Adv]())
- Heterogeneity 
  - Individual-level infectiousness
  - Individual-level susceptibility 
- Scenario modelling 

## Projects
- JST PRESTO
- ESCAPE (Horizon Europe, WP4 Analytics & Tools)
